testcase.name: test_track2_reconstruct_each_trace

failure.message:
AssertionError: answerable rate 80.00% did not reject H0 p≤0.80 at α=0.001 (p=0.5836); summary={'n_traces': 50, 'trace_mix': {'simple': 30, 'multi_version': 10, 'challenge': 10}, 'per_shape_all_six_pass': {'simple': 30, 'multi_version': 0, 'challenge': 10}, 'n_all_six_pass': 40, 'answerable_rate': 0.8, 'per_question_pass_count': {'Q1': 50, 'Q2': 50, 'Q3': 40, 'Q4': 50, 'Q5': 50, 'Q6': 50}, 'binomial_p_value_vs_p_le_0p80': 0.5835594184660668, 'decision': 'FAIL_TO_REJECT', 'target_alpha': 0.001} assert 'FAIL_TO_REJECT' == 'REJECT_H0_p_le_0.80'
- REJECT_H0_p_le_0.80 + FAIL_TO_REJECT

testcase.failure: track2_reconstruction/test_reconstruction.py:165: in test_track2_reconstruct_each_trace assert summary["decision"] == "REJECT_H0_p_le_0.80", ( E AssertionError: answerable rate 80.00% did not reject H0 p≤0.80 at α=0.001 (p=0.5836); summary={'n_traces': 50, 'trace_mix': {'simple': 30, 'multi_version': 10, 'challenge': 10}, 'per_shape_all_six_pass': {'simple': 30, 'multi_version': 0, 'challenge': 10}, 'n_all_six_pass': 40, 'answerable_rate': 0.8, 'per_question_pass_count': {'Q1': 50, 'Q2': 50, 'Q3': 40, 'Q4': 50, 'Q5': 50, 'Q6': 50}, 'binomial_p_value_vs_p_le_0p80': 0.5835594184660668, 'decision': 'FAIL_TO_REJECT', 'target_alpha': 0.001} E assert 'FAIL_TO_REJECT' == 'REJECT_H0_p_le_0.80' E E - REJECT_H0_p_le_0.80 E + FAIL_TO_REJECT
